page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg8a.48xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the AMD EPYC 9T24 processor. Running on the KVM hypervisor, this instance features 192 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, operating at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz. It is equipped with 768.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps. The dedicated CPU allocation model ensures that compute resources are not shared with other tenants, providing predictable execution times for demanding workloads.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio provides a balanced resource density for large-scale deployments. However, the lack of bundled local storage and GPU accelerators represents a clear tradeoff, making this instance less suitable for hardware-accelerated graphics or local-disk-intensive databases. Appropriate workloads include large-scale general-purpose applications, distributed enterprise applications, and parallel compute tasks that benefit from dedicated physical cores without hyperthreading.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg8a.48xlarge is an x86_64 server instance featuring 192 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T24 physical cores running at 2.7 GHz on a KVM hypervisor. With a single thread per core, it provides dedicated compute resources paired with 768.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This hardware profile is designed for large-scale general-purpose workloads, enterprise applications, and parallel processing tasks that require high physical core counts without hyperthreading.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg8a.48xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 192 dedicated AMD EPYC physical cores, 768 GB RAM, and 64 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for large-scale general-purpose enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg8a.48xlarge features 192 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 768 GB RAM, and 64 Gbps bandwidth for general-purpose enterprise workloads.
tagline: A dedicated multi-core processor instance featuring a balanced memory-to-CPU ratio and high-speed network connectivity for enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 192 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T24 physical cores with 1 thread per core
768.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput connectivity
KVM hypervisor architecture with dedicated CPU allocation
Zero local storage and no integrated GPU accelerators
Best suited for distributed enterprise applications and parallel compute tasks
